title: The Lowmark Guild Shipment
target: escort a Lowmark Merchant Guild caravan past the Black Hill toll-gang — they remember the company that turned the gang loose two seasons ago

contributions.line: Marek keeps his eyes on the horizon, his brawny frame tense as he rides point, ready for any sign of trouble.
Imogen diplomatically tries to smooth things over with the toll-gang's headman, her charm a thin veneer over her wariness.
Dren scouts ahead, his quick feet and sharp eyes marking ambush spots with practiced ease, whispering warnings to the others.

outcomeNarrative: Thanks to Marek's steady presence, Imogen's tact, and Dren's vigilance, the caravan passes the Black Hill toll-gang without bloodshed; the Lowmark Guild recognizes your effort with a favorable outcome, and the gang's patience is worn thin.
